hero.subtitle: Based on your real holdings, delivering actionable advice daily — not another news digest.
slogans: tells you exactly what to do next
three dimensions to decode every holding

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password to continue.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: An invite code is all you need to join and get your first decision card.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

sampleCard.summary: Upward trend, neutral position, recent catalysts are slightly positive — small add near current price, control single-position risk.

welcome.title: Welcome, let's get started
welcome.description: Richman gives clear recommendations based on your real holdings. Three-dimensional analysis covers trend, position and catalyst — only the important changes.
welcome.descriptionLine2: Every time you return, a new decision card tells you what to do next — not a flood of information you can't digest.

trend.title: Trend
trend.description: Direction signals for the industry and broader market

position.title: Position
position.description: Whether the current level is relatively high or low within its range

catalyst.title: Catalyst
catalyst.description: Impact of upcoming events and news on expectations

categories.title: What types do you want to follow?
categories.description: Select at least 1. We only analyze the types you choose — you can adjust this in settings at any time.
categories.saveError: Save failed, please try again later

gold_etf.label: Gold ETF
gold_etf.description: ETF funds that track gold prices

us_stock.label: US Stocks
us_stock.description: Individual stocks and ETFs on the US market

firstHolding.title: Add your first holding
firstHolding.description: Just one to start — you can add more later. We need at least one holding to generate a decision card.
firstHolding.positionRatioExtra: This holding's share of your total capital — no total capital needed to calculate

totalCapital.label: Want to see amounts? Set total capital (optional)
totalCapital.invalidValue: Please enter a valid total capital

existingHoldings.description: You can proceed with existing holdings, or add a new one below.

validation.holdingCostAndRatioRequired: Please fill in cost price and position ratio

error.saveFailed: Failed to save holding, please try again

llmConsent.title: AI Interpretation Provider
llmConsent.description: Richman can use a large language model to generate more natural interpretations of your holdings. You can skip, use the system default, or configure your own provider later.

skipCard.title: Skip, use rules engine
skipCard.description: Analysis cards will show a "Rules" badge. You can enable AI interpretation at any time from the settings page.

tryCard.title: I want to try AI interpretation

systemAvailable.description: Your holdings data will be sent to Richman's default AI Provider for analysis via encrypted transmission. This takes effect once you agree, and you can disable it or switch to your own provider in settings at any time.

systemUnavailable.message: System default provider is currently unavailable
systemUnavailable.description: You need to configure your own LLM provider to enable AI interpretation. The button below will take you to the settings page.

message.skipped: AI interpretation skipped, currently using rules engine.
message.unavailable: System default AI provider is unavailable, please configure your own provider.

firstAnalysis.title: Generating your first decision card
firstAnalysis.description: This step only takes a few seconds — Richman will scan your holdings and run a three-dimensional analysis.
firstAnalysis.stuckEscape: Looks stuck? Go directly to Dashboard

skipModal.title: Skip onboarding?
skipModal.content: You can restart the onboarding from Settings later, or click "Start onboarding" in the Dashboard banner to return here.
skipModal.skipError: Skip failed, please try again later
